title: Big Brother
subTitle: A simple and peaceful family are disturbed by an incident that changes their lives forever. Left with no choice but to leave Delhi for Mumbai in disguise, they plan to start life afresh.

title: Damayanthi
subTitle: Vicky has many loans of his father to repay. His mother tells him about a haunted mansion that they own in Devapura. Vicky takes it upon himself to sell the house, which they believe is haunted by Damayanthi's spirit.

title: Karkash
subTitle: A wayward husband vows to punish his dutiful wife after a false rumour spreads in society that questions her fidelity. Eventually, the woman must take dire measures to prove her loyalty and honour.

title: Colors Cineplex
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: 1947: Earth
subTitle: The disaster of Indian/Pakistani partition seen through the eyes of a child - Lenny, an eight-year-old crippled girl - from Lahore, the Punjabi city that saw some of the bloodiest pogroms. The experiences, hopes and fears of this young girl provide an intense portrait of the period.

title: Master Piece
subTitle: Yuva beats up a drug lord while trying to help the woman he loves and faces various threats aimed at his family.

title: Hum
subTitle: A wealthy and cruel businessman and lord over a dockyard is making slaves out of all his workers. Three brothers with a troubled past decides to fight against his injustice.

title: Bhagam Bhag
subTitle: Two theatre artists vying for the lead role set out to find an actress to score winning points with the director. All hell breaks loose as they are caught in the helter-skelter of drug dealings and murder mysteries.

title: Inspector Vijay
subTitle: Vijay, an honest police officer, meets Samyukta at a cafe and falls in love with her. However, his life changes when he witnesses a kidnapping and ends up helping a lonely woman, Lavanya.

title: Big Brother
subTitle: A simple and peaceful family are disturbed by an incident that changes their lives forever. Left with no choice but to leave Delhi for Mumbai in disguise, they plan to start life afresh.

title: Thammudu
subTitle: A brother and a sister share a close bond; when his sister faces multiple challenges in life, he strives to protect her at any cost.

title: Vijay Raghavan
subTitle: An honest IAS officer devotes his life to the upliftment of the youth in his neighbourhood. However, a corrupt businessman's ploy to poison these young minds compels him to challenge the criminal.

title: Vijay Raghavan
subTitle: An honest IAS officer devotes his life to the upliftment of the youth in his neighbourhood. However, a corrupt businessman's ploy to poison these young minds compels him to challenge the criminal.

title: Velaikkaran
subTitle: A youth from the slums fights to end food adulteration that is being committed by large manufacturing companies.

title: Karkash
subTitle: A wayward husband vows to punish his dutiful wife after a false rumour spreads in society that questions her fidelity. Eventually, the woman must take dire measures to prove her loyalty and honour.

title: Meri Jaan
subTitle: On the road to recovering his debts, a young man realises he is also on his way to falling in love.

title: Master Piece
subTitle: Yuva beats up a drug lord while trying to help the woman he loves and faces various threats aimed at his family.

title: Ram Setu
subTitle: An atheist archaeologist turned believer races against time to prove the true existence of the legendary Ram Setu before evil forces destroy the pillar of India's heritage.

title: Saindhav
subTitle: Saindhav, a single parent, lives a peaceful life with his daughter. Things change when Saindhav learns that his daughter has an illness.

title: DD Returns
subTitle: A group of friends hides a bag full of money and jewels in a haunted bungalow to ditch the police. When they try to retrieve the bag, a ghost makes them play a survival game.

title: Devaki Nandana Vasudeva
subTitle: Driven by fear of an astrological prophecy, Kamsa torments his sister's family, convinced her child will cause his downfall. When imprisoned, Krishna shields the family from Kamsa's sinister schemes.

title: Siren
subTitle: After serving 14 years in prison, a man is released on parole. As he tries to reconnect with his family, he vows revenge against those who wronged him.

title: Siren
subTitle: After serving 14 years in prison, a man is released on parole. As he tries to reconnect with his family, he vows revenge against those who wronged him.

title: Vikram Hitlist
subTitle: The police launch a black-ops operation against a mysterious masked vigilante and his team, whose mission is to free society from a dangerous drug epidemic.

title: Colors Cineplex
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Marzi The Power
subTitle: Krishnaveni runs away from home to elope with her lover, Kishore, who does not show up. Gani, a self-centred man, plans to take her to her father, hoping to make a quick buck.

title: The Return of Abhimanyu
subTitle: A soldier takes on a gang of cyber criminals when money goes missing from his account.

title: Seetharamam
subTitle: A woman from Pakistan, Afreen, finds her life forever altered when she travels to India to fulfil her grandfather's dying wish of delivering a love letter written back in 1965.

title: Zombie Reddy
subTitle: Mario, a game developer, and his friends, get caught up in the rivalry between two families and a mysterious zombie attack in Rayalaseema where they go to attend a friend's wedding.

title: Khatarnak Policewala
subTitle: An Assistant Commissioner of Police (Arun Vijay) investigates the murder of a Church Father and a woman's disappearance.

title: Geetanjali 2
subTitle: Sreenu receives a directorial offer from Vishnu to shoot in a bungalow. Later, him and his crew realise that Vishnu orchestrated the ploy to seek revenge by trapping them in a haunted house.

title: Taqdeer
subTitle: Avinash manages to get the phone number of his childhood love Priya, but his phone gets stolen by a gangster. He sets out on a dangerous chase in order to reconcile with his lover.

title: Khaidi No. 150
subTitle: After escaping from prison, a criminal flees the country. Having spent his entire life on the wrong side of the law, he is suddenly move by the plight of farmers he meets there and fights for their cause.
